# Introduction to the Two Factor Model {#two-factor-model}

```{r two-factor-model-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/two-factor-model-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/two-factor-model/"
)
```

```{r child-two-factor-model, child="../lecture-content/22-two-factor-model.Rmd"}
```
